The config file is in `toml` format.

On Windows, it's under `$APPDATA/kazeterm/kazeterm.toml`.

On *nix, it's under `~/.config/kazeterm/kazeterm.toml`

The config file can be opened in terminal dropdown with default open with, the config folder can be found in this dropdown too.

Hot-reload is supported — changes are applied automatically on save.
